svg.title: Repository runtime architecture diagram
svg.desc: Flowchart showing user browser connecting to user-frontend on Vercel and admin-frontend on Railway, both sending API requests to a backend on Railway, which connects to PostgreSQL, file uploads, Python tools, a geocoding API, and analytics. CDN libraries are loaded by the user-frontend.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the user browser entry point')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the user-frontend on Vercel')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the admin-frontend on Railway')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the backend API on Railway')
sendPrompt('What does the Leaflet/MarkerCluster CDN provide?')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the PostgreSQL database on Railway')
sendPrompt('How does the backend handle file storage?')
sendPrompt('What Python tools are used by the backend?')
sendPrompt('What external geocoding API is used?')
sendPrompt('What analytics or monitoring tools are used?')

svg.text: Vercel hosts user-frontend · Railway hosts API, admin-frontend, PostgreSQL
